qa_pairs.question: If my invitation email allows me to request 100 TB of project storage, how much additional project storage can I request through Fast Track?
qa_pairs.answer: You may request an additional 10 TB, making your new total request 110 TB.

qa_pairs.question: If my invitation email allows a maximum of 1,000 TB of nearline storage, what is the maximum additional nearline storage I can request?
qa_pairs.answer: You can request up to 50 TB more, making your new storage request 1,050 TB, as the request increase is capped at 50 TB even though 10% would be 100 TB.

qa_pairs.question: Can I request an increase in CPU or GPU resources via the Fast Track application?
qa_pairs.answer: No, an increase of CPU or GPU requests is not allowed. You may only request up to the amount mentioned in your invitation email.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I need more CPU or GPU compute resources than what is specified in my Fast Track invitation email?
qa_pairs.answer: If you need more compute resources than what's mentioned in your invitation email, you must submit a new application.
